Vendored third-party code used by the backend data gatherer.

- `lseg_toolkit/` is copied from:
  `https://github.com/jlipworth/jl-lseg-toolkit`
- License file:
  `jl-lseg-toolkit.LICENSE`

Notes:
- The gatherer script imports this vendored package first.
- Runtime still requires LSEG Workspace Desktop and the `lseg.data` runtime dependency.
